title: 'Search Everything' typing in the field will work only after clicking with the mouse on the field
excerpt:
‘Search Everything’ typing in the field will work only after clicking with the mouse on the field. 
I already clicked the ‘Search Everything’ icon and opened the pop up, the only purpose of this pop up would be to type i…

posts.author: Shiranos (Shiran Tal)
posts.cookedHtml:
‘Search Everything’ typing in the field will work only after clicking with the mouse on the field.
I already clicked the ‘Search Everything’ icon and opened the pop up, the only purpose of this pop up would be to type in the field, please fix it , the field should be activated for typing as soon as the pop up is opened. No need for additional click.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Shiranos,

I have tested this on my end and as soon as I finish typing it begins to automatically search. This isn’t the case on your end? Can you try testing this in an incognito window?

posts.author: Shiranos (Shiran Tal)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi
I think you misunderstood me

I meant that in order to start typing in the search field , I would have to click the search field with my mouse first… and that’s just such an unnecessary step.
